title: Wanderful Trades
description: New trades for the Wandering Trader. Includinf maps to random structures! Standalone from Travelers Wits
body:
This is a Standalone version of the Wandering Trader changes from [Traveler's Wits](https://modrinth.com/datapack/travelers-wits)
Currently has versions for 1.16 to 1.21, versions between 1.16 and 1.19 are NOT fully tested, so they may have issues with them, but the main functions should work

With it Wandering Traders will now buy items from you, and even sell Traveler's Maps that will lead you to several different structures!


<details>
<summary>Changes/Trades</summary>

It mayl buy from you, for 4 emeralds, the following items:
- Rotten Flesh, String, Bones, Bread, Baked Potatoes, Redstone, Coal, Gunpowder, Milk Bucket, Water Bucket, Spider Eyes

For 10 emeralds, it can give a Traveler's Map that may lead to the following Structures:
- Villages, Jungle Temples, Desert Temples, Witch Huts, Trail Ruins(1.20+), Igloos, Pillager Outposts
- The list goes from the most Common to most Rare

It also adds 2 Advancements for each trade type(buying Map or selling for Emeralds)

</details>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZK2vaoGFASY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
